title: Mathematical Modeling of HDV RNA, HBsAg, and ALT Kinetics in Patients with Compensated Cirrhosis: Insights from 96 Weeks of Bulevirtide Monotherapy.
abstract: Bulevirtide (BLV) 2 mg/day is approved for the treatment of compensated chronic hepatitis D virus (HDV) infection in Europe; however, understanding HDV-RNA, HBsAg and ALT dynamics under 96 weeks of BLV monotherapy is lacking.
